team_style_facts: 本地战术包记录新西兰依靠Chris Wood支点、二点球、传中和定位球。
Guardian首轮XI说明预计4-2-3-1，更防守，前场依赖Just、Singh、McCowatt速度。
Guardian首轮记录新西兰14次射门、8次射正，开放战产量显著高于赛前预估。
首轮两个进球均为Eli Just进球、Chris Wood助攻，Wood支点外溢明确。
本地复盘要求将新西兰开放战产量、Wood支点外溢和总进球尾部上调。

round1_match_shape.shape: 4-2-3-1；Crocombe behind Payne-Surman-Boxall-Cacace, Bell-Stamenic double pivot, Just-Singh-McCowatt behind Wood.
round1_match_shape.goals_for: Elijah Just 7 and 55, both assisted by Chris Wood

substitutions: 68: Ryan Thomas and Ben Old for Callum McCowatt and Liberato Cacace
90+2: additional New Zealand changes mentioned but names not listed in accessible Guardian text
cards: No New Zealand yellow/red cards confirmed in accessible sources
